he did good (to someone like اللَّهُ did to you)
he loves (subject of لا in لا يُحِبُّ)
the people who cause damage (object of يُحِبُّ - loves)
I was given it (referring to wealth/provision mentioned earlier)
with me (in response to أُوتِيتُهُۥ - I was given it)
and did not...? (connects to يَعْلَمْ - he know)
Allah (as the object of يَعْلَمْ - he knew)
from (connects قَبْلِهِۦ to what comes after)
who (is stronger than him in power)
stronger, more intense (than مِنْهُ - than him)
from him (referring to the knowledge mentioned before)
a strength/power (as object of أَشَدُّ - stronger)
and more numerous (subject of the sentence)
in gathering (describing what they were more abundant in)
he is being asked (about ذُنُوبِهِمُ/their sins)
so/then he went out/exited (subject of قَالَ)
upon, on, over (connects to قَوْمِهِۦ - his people)
they want/desire (referring to those who said the previous statement)
for us (connected to يٰلَيْتَ - 'oh would that')
was given (referring to what Qarun was given)
the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)
woe to you all (said by الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ - those given knowledge)
and not (connects to ثَوَابُ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ)
is made to receive it (referring to the reward mentioned earlier)
and so we sank (something) into the ground (acting on الْأَرْضَ)
and with his house (connected to فَخَسَفْنَا)
the earth (object of خَسَفْنَا/We caused to swallow)
he was (subject of يَنصُرُونَ - they help/support)
for him (referring to قارون, the one being helped)
they help/support him (referring to Qarun in كَانَ)
any (when used before an indefinite noun like فِئَةٍ)
he was (part of negative phrase with مَا)
the ones who help/defend themselves (object of كَانَ)
and he became (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)
they wished something for themselves intensely
his place (object of تَمَنَّوْا - they wished for)
Allah (as the object of مَنَّ - bestowed favor)
if not, had it not been
he bestowed great favor (subject of لَخَسَفَ)
he would surely have made (something) sink
with us (connected to لَخَسَفَ - would have swallowed)
woe! it is as if he/it
the ones who reject (truth) (subject of لَا يُفْلِحُ - will not succeed)
that (feminine, pointing to something far away) (points to ٱلدَّارُ)
we make/set it (referring to الدَّارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةُ - the final home)
they want/desire (referring to those who don't seek elevation or corruption)
arrogantly (in relation to لَا يُرِيدُونَ - they do not want)
for the ones who guard against evil
with the good deed (object of جَآءَ - came with)
then for him (referring to whoever brings a good deed)
with/by the evil deed/sin (object of جَآءَ)
so not/then not (connects to يُجْزَى - they will be recompensed)
he is given what is due (passive of جَآءَ)
they used to work/act/do (object of كَانُوا)
the one who/that which - relative pronoun that connects a description to what is being described
he made required (the Quran upon you)
place of return (being described in this ayah)
more knowing (than those who are misguided)
and whoever (is connected to مَن جَآءَ 'whoever came' earlier in the ayah)
it is given/delivered (to إِلَيْكَ - to you)
to you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this ayah)
the book (subject of يُلْقَىٰٓ - is sent down)
you will definitely be (a helper for the disbelievers)
and not (connected to يَصُدُّنَّكَ - let them not prevent you)
he surely blocks/prevents you (from عَنْ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ - from Allah's signs)
when (referring to أُنزِلَتْ - they were sent down)
the polytheists (those who join partners with Allah)
you (feminine) call/invite (in negative context with لَا)
a god/deity (object of تَدْعُ - do not call upon)
there is not (strong negation of إِلٰهَ)
except (in this ayah: everything will perish except His Face)
except (excluding هُوَ from the statement لَآ إِلٰهَ)
His Face (referring to Allah's Face, being excluded from destruction)
for him/to him (connected to الْحُكْمُ - the judgment)
the judgment/authority (belongs to لَهُ - to Him)
